title: hieracium pilosella var. peleteriana
intro: Hieracium pilosella var. peleteriana, also known as a variety of the common hawkweed, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) with yellow flowers and leaves that resemble those of the dandelion. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a potential treatment for wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular choice for natural remedies. Hieracium pilosella var. peleteriana is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, and can also be consumed as a raw leaf or root.
